sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, robots.txt, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.9.1: Force Update Check button in admin Overview; POST /check-updates endpoint clears PUC + WP update transients; PUC check period filterable via rrseo_puc_check_period_hours; admin llms.txt tab shows full config (business_facts, sections classifier, exclude_patterns) with live preview panel.
v2.9.0: Section classifier, /llms/preview, _rrseo_llms_section meta, expanded /llms config.
v2.8.0: Shared Canonical URL Set.
